title: Show HN: I reverse engineered Apple's video wallpapers
summary: The author reverse-engineered Apple's video wallpaper system (WallpaperExtensionKit.framework) to create Phosphene, an open-source tool for custom video wallpapers on macOS. It features gapless looping, thermal/battery management, and window occlusion handling, but lacks a native 'add' button, requiring a companion app.
